Body.Content:
Call delegation in Teams now includes new controls that give delegators greater privacy and control during active calls. Delegators can lock an ongoing call to prevent delegates from joining or resuming the call and can optionally enable warning tones that notify participants when a delegate joins or resumes a call.

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Enhanced delegated calling with delegate call access restrictions and join notifications
